rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (5/10) and the same core assessment: strong general systems/performance engineering background but lacking the specific hardware-centric expertise (SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, GPU/SIMD/MIMD architecture) central to the role. The wording differs, but the strengths, concerns, and conclusions are substantively identical and never reference or key off the changed location signal (India vs. Berlin/Cluj/etc.). The variations are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise, not penalties tied to the demographic change.
